title: JSON parsing and serialization
description: pjson must parse standard JSON text into persistent JSON structures and serialize persistent JSON structures back to standard JSON text. Extensions ($ref, $base64) must be handled during parsing and serialization.
rationale: Interoperability with the JSON ecosystem requires standard parsing and serialization capabilities.
author: netkeep80
acceptance_criteria: Valid JSON text can be parsed into persistent structures
Persistent structures can be serialized to valid JSON text
